query:
SELECT vt.id, vt.slug, vt.label, vt.category
FROM violation_tags vt
WHERE vt.category IN ('law_enforcement','public_records','civil_rights','other','prosecutorial_conduct')
ORDER BY vt.category, vt.label;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2N1WTErRdSjheBh.e46440e12186 --database 3yhU3DrKzf8Z5BNtvxatFF --execute 
SELECT vt.id, vt.slug, vt.label, vt.category
FROM violation_tags vt
WHERE vt.category IN ('law_enforcement','public_records','civil_rights','other','prosecutorial_conduct')
ORDER BY vt.category, vt.label;
